meta.title: Real Fighter Pilot Walks You Through the REQUIREMENTS to Become a Fighter Pilot (2020)
meta.description:
Important requirements for becoming a Fighter Pilot--you won't find a lot of these on the USAF website. You'll also understand the 'why' behind the requirements after watching this.

HOW TO become a FIGHTER PILOT: 
https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/pilot-newsletter

SUBSCRIBE for regular videos▶ https://www.youtube.com/c/HasardLee

How to connect:
Podcast: https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/listen
LinkedIn-- https://www.linkedin.com/in/justinfighterpilot/
Instagram-- https://www.instagram.com/justinfighterpilot/
Facebook--https://www.facebook.com/justinfighterpilot/

#fighterpilot
#USAF
#SUPT
